hero.title: Translate Your Documents
hero.subtitle: AI-powered translation with expert human review. Fast, accurate, and secure document translation services for school bulletins, diplomas, transcripts, attestations, and more.

services.title: Document Translation Services
services.subtitle: Professional translation services for all your document needs. From school bulletins to state diplomas, we handle a wide range of academic and official documents.

academic.title: Academic & Official Documents
academic.description: French-system academic documents translated to English with expert verification and certified output.

official.title: Official Documents
official.description: Government-issued documents translated with certified accuracy.

business.title: Business Documents
business.description: Corporate and business documents for international operations.

personal.title: Personal Documents
personal.description: Personal correspondence and documents for individual needs.

languages.title: Multiple Language Pairs
languages.subtitle: Translate documents between multiple language pairs. We're constantly expanding our language support.
languages.moreComingSoon: More language pairs are being added regularly. Contact us for specific language requests.

features.sectionSubtitle: Combining AI speed with human expertise for unmatched translation quality.

aiPowered.title: AI-Powered Translation
aiPowered.description: Advanced AI extracts and translates content with high accuracy, ensuring fast turnaround times.

expertReview.title: Expert Human Review
expertReview.description: Specialized translators review every document to ensure accuracy and cultural context.

multiLanguage.title: Multi-Language Support
multiLanguage.description: Translate between multiple language pairs with more languages added regularly.

multiDocument.title: Multiple Document Types
multiDocument.description: Academic transcripts, official documents, business papers, and more.

secure.title: Secure & Private
secure.description: Your documents are encrypted and handled with strict confidentiality.

fast.title: Fast Turnaround
fast.description: Get your translated documents quickly without sacrificing quality.

login.subtitle: Sign in to your account to continue

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password

validation.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters long

header.title: My Documents
header.subtitle: Upload documents, view translations, and download your translated files.

upload.title: 📤 Upload New Document
upload.dragDrop: Drag and drop your document here or click to select
upload.supportedFormats: Supports PNG, JPG, JPEG, GIF, WEBP (max 10MB)

bulletinsList.title: Your Documents
bulletinsList.noUploads: No documents uploaded yet. Upload your first document above!

verification.pageSubtitle: Verify the authenticity of translated documents with our secure verification system

loading.title: Verifying Document...
loading.description: Please wait while we verify the document authenticity

error.title: Verification Failed
error.invalidUrl: Invalid verification URL. Document ID missing.
error.notFound: Document not found or verification failed.
error.notFoundDescription: No certified document matches this ID. Please check the certification ID and try again.
error.generic: Error verifying document. Please try again.

success.title: Document Verified
success.description: This document has been successfully verified and is authentic.

draft.title: AI-Generated Draft
draft.description: This document was generated by AI and has NOT been reviewed or certified by a professional translator. It should not be used as an official translation.

certified.title: Certified Translation Verified
certified.description: This document has been professionally reviewed and certified by Nyota Translation Center.

certInput.label: Certification ID
certInput.hint: Enter the certification ID printed on your document (format: NTC-YYYY-XXXXXX)

hash.title: Tamper Detection
hash.description: Upload the certified PDF to verify it has not been altered since certification.
hash.uploadPrompt: Click or drag to upload certified PDF

idle.title: How to verify your document
idle.step1: Find the Certification ID on your document (e.g. NTC-2026-A7K9F2)
idle.step2: Enter the ID above and click Verify
idle.step3: Optionally upload the PDF to detect any tampering

blockchain.title: 🔗 Secure Verification
blockchain.description: This document verification ensures authenticity and prevents tampering.

institution.title: Nyota Translation Center
institution.description: This document has been verified as authentic and was generated through our secure system.

contact.title: Need Help or Have Questions?
contact.description: For any inquiries about this document verification, please contact Nyota Translation Center directly.

invalid.title: ❌ Document Not Valid
invalid.description: This document could not be verified or has been tampered with.

status.waiting: Tap an option above to continue

chat.selectDocType: I'll help you translate your academic document into English. First, what type of document do you have?
chat.selectDrcTemplate: Which type of DRC document do you want to translate?
chat.uploadPrompt: Great choice! Now upload your document. You can take a photo or select a file.
chat.uploadPromptShort: Now upload your document. You can take a photo or select a file.
chat.uploadRetry: Let's try again. Upload your document below.
chat.documentProcessed: ✅ Document processed! I found a document for **{{name}}**. Here's your AI-generated draft preview.
chat.resumeDocument: I found your document for **{{name}}**. Here's your AI-generated draft preview.
chat.selectAction: What would you like to do with this translation?
chat.selectSpeed: How quickly do you need your certified translation?
chat.paymentPrompt: 💳 Please complete your payment to submit your document for **{{tier}}** certified translation.
chat.paymentCancel: No problem! Would you like to choose a different plan or go back?
chat.paymentSuccess: 🎉 Payment confirmed and your document has been submitted for **{{tier}}** certified translation! A professional translator will review it. You'll receive an email when it's ready.
chat.paymentSuccessNext: You can check your document status and payment history from your dashboard. Would you like to translate another document?
chat.paymentFailedSubmit: ⚠️ Your payment was processed but submission failed: {{error}}. Don't worry — your payment is safe. Please try submitting again or contact support.
chat.paymentFailed: ❌ Payment failed: {{error}}. Your document has not been submitted. You can try again with a different card.
chat.pdfOpened: 📄 Your draft PDF has been opened in a new tab! What would you like to do next?
chat.pdfGeneratingDesc: This may take a moment. The document will appear here automatically.
chat.errorUpload: ❌ Sorry, I couldn't process your document: {{error}}.
chat.errorLoadDoc: ❌ Sorry, I couldn't load your document: {{error}}
chat.errorMissingData: ❌ Missing document data. Please try uploading again.
chat.goBackPrompt: No problem! What type of document do you have?
chat.goBackFresh: No problem! Let's start fresh. What type of document do you have?
chat.resumeCertified:
Your document for **{{name}}** has been **certified** ({{certId}}).

You can download the certified PDF from the **My Translations** tab. You can still view the free draft below.
chat.resumeRejected:
Your document for **{{name}}** was **rejected** by the reviewer.{{reason}}

You can re-upload a clearer image from the **My Translations** tab. You can still view the free draft below.
chat.resumeInProgress:
Your document for **{{name}}** is currently **{{status}}**. A translator is working on it.

You can still view the free draft while you wait.

upload.dropPrompt: Drop your document here or tap to browse
upload.formats: PNG, JPG, WEBP, or PDF — up to {{size}}MB
upload.invalidType: Please upload an image (PNG, JPG, WEBP) or PDF file.
